Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfig

Packages that use MediaConfig
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
 

Uses of MediaConfig in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return MediaConfig
 MediaConfig MediaConfig.createCustomizedClone(Parameters params)
          Create a new MediaConfig, altering the given parameters with the given values.
 MediaConfig MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(Configuration<?> configuration)
          Return an instance of predefined MediaConfig, as described by the given Configuration
 MediaConfig MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(java.io.Reader xmlDef)
          Create an instance of MediaConfig, from an xml byte stream (for example a file, or a String),
Example: Reader xmlDoc = new StringReader("<?
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol with parameters of type MediaConfig
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 

Uses of MediaConfig in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with parameters of type MediaConfig
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
